response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:18.800: Performer Tokino Sora introduces the concert. 2. 02:18.801-04:55.300: Performance of 'Meisei Galactica'. Credits '作詞・作曲：アユダン星人' identified from on-screen text. Lyrics transcribed from video as no direct official lyric page was easily retrievable via search tool for 'アユダン星人'. 3. 04:55.301-04:58.000: Outro.
response.global_summary: Tokino Sora introduces her birthday concert and her special guest, Shirakami Fubuki. They then perform 'Meisei Galactica' (明星ギャラクティカ) together.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora waves to the audience and introduces her birthday concert. She announces her guest, Shirakami Fubuki, and prepares for the performance.
Tokino Sora and Shirakami Fubuki perform 'Meisei Galactica'. Lyrics '作詞・作曲：アユダン星人' are displayed on-screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: [Full English translation is not directly available, but song themes include stellar romance, galaxy-spanning journey, and neon lights.]

scenes.description: The song concludes, and the performers bow/wave to the audience.
